title: FixPotionInventory
description: Stack your potions up to 16! Configurable stack size, and works with vanilla and modded potions
body:
# FixPotionInventory

**Tired of potions cluttering your inventory? This mod is the solution!**

By default, Minecraft potions do not stack, taking up valuable inventory slots. **FixPotionInventory** changes this mechanic, allowing all drinkable potions, splash potions, and lingering potions to stack up to **16**.

### ✨ Features
* **Stackable Potions:** You can now stack up to 16 potions in a single slot.
* **Mod Compatibility:** Fully supports potions from other mods (modded potions will also stack!).
* **Plug & Play:** No configuration required. Just install and play.

### 📦 Installation
1.  Install your mod loader (Forge/NeoForge/Fabric).
2.  Drop the `.jar` file into your `mods` folder.
3.  Enjoy a cleaner inventory!

*This mod is designed to improve quality of life and inventory management.*
